title: stylodon carneus
side_effects: Stylodon carneus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to its high levels of toxic compounds. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to headaches, dizziness, and even seizures in some individuals. Furthermore, improper use of stylodon carneus may also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory problems. In extreme cases, consuming large quantities of the plant can be fatal, making it essential to use it under the guidance of a medical professional.
